prestazioni: Replace the stock 1GR-FE 4.0L V6 (300hp) with a fully built 1GR-FKS variant featuring a forged internals kit from Tomei (pistons, connecting rods, crankshaft) and a custom billet crankshaft from Manley, paired with a Garrett GTX4202R turbocharger (1.28 A/R turbine housing) and a GReddy Type-24 intercooler core (400x200x120mm) for sustained 550whp on E85 fuel with a Motec M150 ECU managing a 25psi boost curve and sequential twin-injection (ID1000 primary + Bosch 0280158002 secondary injectors).

Install a custom 3.5-inch titanium exhaust system by HKS Hi-Power Spec-L (dual 3.5-inch mandrel-bent piping with 200-cell catalytic converters and a 3.5-inch titanium muffler) to reduce backpressure while maintaining GRMN-specific acoustic tuning, paired with a custom equal-length stainless steel header from Jun Auto (4-2-1 design with 1.75-inch primaries and 2.5-inch collectors).

Upgrade the GRMN-specific 6-speed manual transmission (C66) with a OS Giken 1.5-way LSD (2.2 final drive ratio), a Sachs Performance twin-disc clutch (paddle-type, 240mm disc diameter), and a custom billet aluminum shift fork from PPG to handle the increased torque, while reinforcing the transmission case with a Cusco Type-RS transmission brace and a custom aluminum differential mount from TRD.
estetica: Replace the stock GRMN front bumper with a custom carbon fiber widebody kit from Varis Japan (GRMN-specific, featuring integrated canards and a 3D-printed ABS splitter with adjustable dive planes), paired with a custom carbon fiber hood from Seibon (with a 50mm vented scoop for intercooler airflow) and a GRMN-exclusive rear diffuser from Rocket Bunny (Pandem V3, carbon fiber, with integrated exhaust cutouts).

Install a custom suspension setup featuring Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (GRMN-specific valving, 2-way adjustable dampers, 30-way adjustable rebound, and 20mm adjustable ride height) with custom titanium top mounts from Cusco and spherical bearing control arms from Whiteline (front and rear, adjustable camber and caster).

Replace the stock GRMN wheels with a set of custom forged 17x9 +25 ET BBS LM-R wheels (gold finish, 5x114.3 PCD, 7.5kg per wheel) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (245/35/17 front, 275/35/17 rear), paired with custom titanium wheel spacers from HRE (5mm front, 10mm rear) and a set of titanium lug nuts from Muteki (M12x1.5, 20g each).
